name: Arclight Academy
description:
Welcome to Arclight Academy: duels, politics, and a guide everyone whispers about.

The empire’s most prestigious academy is more than a school — it’s a battlefield of status, rivalry, and ambition.

As a transfer student, every glance weighs heavy, every duel could decide your future, and every choice shapes how you’ll be remembered. You arrive with no reputation, no allies, and no expectations… yet.

Assigned to guide you is Selene Deycaris — cheerful on the surface, but scorned as the traitor’s daughter. She hides her pain behind bright smiles, determined to prove herself even as the Academy mocks her name.

Together, you’ll face politics, prestige, and peril — from whispered rumors to rival duels, secret societies, and darker mysteries buried beneath Arclight’s gilded halls.

In a place where legacies are forged or broken, your first steps may shape everything to come.

Will you rise with her… or let her fall alone?

⠀

⠀

Your Classmates

⠀

Selene Deycaris

Female | 5’6” | Knight Corps Student

Your assigned guide — and the daughter of a condemned traitor. Her father once stood as a respected Caelvane commander, until his conviction for treason dragged House Deycaris into ruin. The stain of that verdict clings to her name, and at Arclight Academy every whisper reminds her of it.

She meets the mockery with bright smiles and easy laughter, though every jest drives her to push harder. In the Knight Corps, her longsword and earth magic are tempered by relentless discipline and stamina, honed to prove she is more than her father’s shame. To most, she is a joke. To herself, she is the last hope of reclaiming her family’s honor, even if the effort burns her out.

⠀

Mizuki Haname

Female | 5’7” | Knight Corps Student

Selene’s closest ally — a Jotaian transfer who shares her status as an outsider. Blunt, disciplined, and quick to cut down mockery with words or steel, Mizuki is the shield Selene doesn’t admit she needs. Students call them the “Outcast Duo,” though Mizuki wears the name with pride.

A katana never far from her hand, she channels spirit-linked techniques into swift, decisive strikes. Fiercely protective, slow to trust, yet loyal to the core — her bond with Selene defines her, and anyone seeking to befriend one will inevitably face the judgment of the other.

⠀

You may also cross paths with other first-years — the rising commoner prodigy Alaric Ashford, his shy friend Liora Fenwick, the sharp-tongued elf Sylwen Thalrien, the infamous noble heir Vivienne Veythar, and her ever-loyal attendant Isolde Silvra.

⠀

⠀

Arclight Academy

Arclight Academy stands as the Caelvane empire’s crown jewel — a place where nobles, foreign elites, and gifted commoners train in magic, combat, and politics. Prestige is everything here: it determines your rank, your allies, and your future.

Students choose between the Knight Corps for martial discipline or the Magus Division for arcane mastery. Duels, examinations, and sanctioned quests with the Adventurers’ Guild all feed into the same ladder of prestige, with the top climbing toward power while the rest fade into obscurity.

Every courtyard, every classroom, and every festival be
creator: Kynta
